title: Tom Briggs
compiled_truth: Tom Briggs is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-11 to 2001-11-29), Tom Briggs sent 28 and received 738 emails, totalling 766 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (12), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (10), [Cynthia Sandherr](people/cynthia-sandherr) (8), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (7), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (7).
